layout.live_first_20_session_report.json: same archive dir as manifest (preflight writes via script to archive + root copy)
layout.live_first_20_session_report_note: scripts/live_coinbase_first_twenty.py writes manifest under archive and also EZRAS_RUNTIME_ROOT/live_first_20_session_manifest.json
layout.trade_events.jsonl: resolved by databank: TRADE_DATABANK_MEMORY_ROOT if set, else <EZRAS_RUNTIME_ROOT>/databank/trade_events.jsonl

databank_resolution.live_run_recommendation: export TRADE_DATABANK_MEMORY_ROOT=$EZRAS_RUNTIME_ROOT/databank OR rely on EZRAS_RUNTIME_ROOT/databank default

writability.governance_log: parent of governance_gate_decisions.log must be writable (check 8)

global_memory_note: ReviewStorage uses GlobalMemoryStore under shark/memory/global — same tree as joint_review_latest.json per trading_ai.global_layer.review_storage + global_memory_store.
